rationale: Section 49.003 governs attendance credit and nonresident student calculations for local revenue level determinations. It does not reference homestead exemptions or property tax appraisal values, so no conflict arises.
quote:
In determining whether a school district has a local revenue level in excess of entitlement, the commissioner shall use:
(1) the district's final weighted average daily attendance; and
(2) the amount of attendance credit a district purchases under Subchapter D or the number of nonresident students a district educates under Subchapter E for a school year.
_note: No direct conflict. The proposed homestead exemption increase affects property tax revenue but this section addresses attendance-based revenue calculations only.
